style_effects: Gentle, iridescent fairy dust particles drift lazily upward in a soft golden-hued glow, forming delicate petal-shaped aura particles that pulse gently around Magikarp's body. A warm, pearlescent luminescence emanates from its scales, refracting light like dewdrops on petals, with faint musical note vibrations shimmering in the air as delicate ripples of pastel pink and lavender light. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
